package.name: wall_follower_rl
package.description:
Q-Learning and SARSA wall-following for Triton robot.
Requires stingray_sim package for Gazebo simulation.
TRAINING: roslaunch wall_follower_rl wall_follower.launch algorithm:=qlearning mode:=train roslaunch wall_follower_rl wall_follower.launch algorithm:=sarsa mode:=train
TESTING (uses included best learned policy): roslaunch wall_follower_rl wall_follower.launch algorithm:=qlearning mode:=test roslaunch wall_follower_rl wall_follower.launch algorithm:=sarsa mode:=test
Hyperparameters: Q-Learning: alpha=0.10, gamma=0.95, epsilon_start=0.90, epsilon_decay=0.997 Episodes 1-300: epsilon_start=0.90, epsilon_decay=0.997 Episodes 301-400: epsilon_start=0.30, epsilon_decay=0.99 (fine-tuning)
SARSA: alpha=0.10, gamma=0.95, epsilon_start=0.50, epsilon_decay=0.99 300 episodes total
State: 27 states (3 sectors x 3 distance bins) Actions: 5 (hard-left, soft-left, straight, soft-right, hard-right)
